citation.sourceDocument: U.S. Department of Education (Federal Student Aid), 2026-27 SAI and Pell Grant Eligibility Guide (dependent student)
citation.sourceNote: Parents' income protection allowance is the guide's exact Table A2 ($29,190 / $36,330 / $44,880 / $52,950 / $61,930 for family sizes 2-6, +$6,990 per additional member); the parents' AAI assessment is the exact Table A5 marginal schedule (22% to $21,800, then 25% / 29% / 34% / 40% / 47% at $21,800 / $27,300 / $32,800 / $38,400 / $43,900). Student IPA $11,770, employment-expense allowance 35% capped at $5,000, parent asset rate 12%, student income rate 50%, student asset rate 20%, SAI floor -$1,500. Max Pell $7,395 / min $740 (2026-27 ED Dear Colleague Letter). The Table A5 -$8,500/-$1,870 negative-AAI floor is approximated by the lowest rate applied to negative AAI; the SAI floor at -$1,500 dominates that region.
